_meta.session: BMT batch 1 — Priorities 10 + 11. Real scores from SecRepoBench v2 paper and Vals.ai Finance Agent v1.1 leaderboard. MegaVul is a raw dataset (no leaderboard). BLINK has legacy 2024 scores only for non-tracked models.

benchmarks.name: SecRepoBench
benchmarks.description: 318 repo-level secure code completion tasks; secure-pass@1 metric.

benchmarks.name: MegaVul
benchmarks.description: 17,380 real C/C++ CVE vulnerabilities dataset for vulnerability detection research.

benchmarks.name: BLINK
benchmarks.description: 3,807 visual perception tasks across depth estimation, forensics, multi-view. Tests core vision primitives.

benchmarks.name: Finance Agent Benchmark
benchmarks.description: Vals.ai 537 finance research questions with tool use. Frontier vertical-domain agent eval.

scores._note: SecRepoBench v2 — highest secure-pass@1 among standalone LLMs
Vals.ai Finance Agent v1.1, Thinking mode
